holdings.infoBox: SPIN is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.82%, Alphabet at 6.15%, Microsoft at 5.94%, Apple at 5.64%, and Amazon.com at 4.82%.

overview.description: The State Street US Equity Premium Income ETF (SPIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in large- and mid-cap US stocks, while utilizing a laddered, naked call writing strategy. The fund seeks to provide current income and long-term capital appreciation. SPIN was launched on Sep 4, 2024 and is issued by State Street.
